query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
        FROM threads t
        LEFT JOIN channels c ON c.id = t.channel_id
        WHERE 1=1
          AND ($1 = '' OR t.status = ANY(string_to_array($2, ',')))
          AND ($3 = '' OR t.cause = $4)
          AND ($5 = 0::bigint OR t.channel_id = $6)
          AND ($7 = 0::bigint OR t.id = $8)
          AND ($9 = 0::bigint OR t.parent_id = $10)
